headline: Bad week for 'the ants' as ripple effects of Korean crash spread out across Asia
detail: This headline points to broader market weakness, particularly impacting retail investors. Given your concentrated, leveraged tech portfolio, widespread downturns will amplify your drawdowns significantly.
rec: Review your QQQ and SMH positions. Consider trimming some exposure to reduce overall market risk, especially if they approach their indicated stops of 670 and 540 respectively.

headline: Chinese startup Moonshot AI unveils Kimi model it says rivals OpenAI, Anthropic
detail: This highlights intensifying global competition and innovation in AI. Continued advancements fuel demand for advanced chips and tech infrastructure, benefiting your core sector.
rec: No direct action on existing holdings, but this reinforces the long-term bullish thesis for chip and AI-related tech names in your portfolio.

headline: Xi pitches China as AI partner to developing world, warns against risks and security overreach
detail: China's active promotion of AI development and partnerships underscores its strategic importance globally. This sustained focus will likely continue to drive investment and demand within the technology and semiconductor sectors.
rec: No direct action on holdings. If considering new tech exposure, scanner shows NVDA as a BUY at 206.55-206.25 with a stop at 205.54, aligning with AI sector strength.
